prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名2026年第80名，近年稳定在80名左右，属全国中上游理工类高校；第五轮学科评估中，管理科学与工程获评A级（唯一A-及以上学科），与该校信息管理与信息系统、大数据管理与应用等招生专业直接关联；机械工程 、仪器科学等工科实力亦较强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件通报；抖音热度排名第77位，评价为"一般"，未出现高热关注；2025年曾出现热门专业投档线暴跌信号，对报考心理有一 定抑制。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，对物理类考生吸引力强；湖南省2026年物理类考 生约34.7万人，较2025年32.0万人增加约8.4%，竞争明显加剧，2025年本科批405分，近年波动不大；合肥工业大学位于安徽省合肥市，属中 部地区；在湖南省招生占比约2.5%（2024年数据），非该校主要生源地，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅缩招、湖南省物理类 考生显著增加约8.4%以及声誉偏负面等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年有所加剧，位次小幅前移；预测最低位次约19450名，区间18950–19950名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间18950–19950名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如18900名以内）可重点冲刺计算机科学与技术、电气 工程及其自动化等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（如19900名以外）应以三档专业保底为主，谨慎选择一档专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 16226 → 19693 → 18878 → 20060 → 20003, showing an overall backward trend. In the past three years, it fluctuated within the 18800–20100 range, with a baseline of about 20003 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan was 146 in 2021, 145 in 2022, 147 in 2023, 144 in 2024, and 149 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 144, a decrease of 5 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 3.4%, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranked 80th, stable around 80th in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of science and engineering universities nationwide. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Management Science and Engineering was rated A-level (the only A- or above discipline), directly related to enrollment majors such as Information Management and Information Systems, and Big Data Management and Application. Mechanical Engineering, Instrument Science, and other engineering disciplines are also relatively strong. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving reports of academic misconduct. On Douyin, it ranks 77th in popularity, rated as 'average', without high attention. In 2025, there was a signal of a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors, which somewhat suppresses application psychology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, strongly attracting Physics Category candidates. In 2026, there are about 347,000 Physics Category candidates in Hunan, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. The 2025 undergraduate batch line was 405 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. Hefei University of Technology is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, in the central region. Its enrollment proportion in Hunan is about 2.5% (2024 data), not a major source of students, so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase of about 8.4% in Physics Category candidates in Hunan, and the somewhat negative reputation, competition in 2026 is expected to intensify compared to 2025, with rankings slightly moving forward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 19450, with a range of 18950–19950.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Electrical Engineering and Automation (including Innovation Experimental Class)
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems (including Innovation Experimental Class)
- Software Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Automation
- Electronic Information Engineering
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering
- Communication Engineering
- Vehicle Engineering/Intelligent Vehicle Engineering
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Architecture
- Financial Engineering
- Accounting (Smart Finance)
- Information Management and Information Systems
- Business Administration.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 18950–19950, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 18900), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Electrical Engineering and Automation. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 19900), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety and be cautious with Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 4051 → 4703 → 4128 → 4859 → 3614, showing significant fluctuations overall, with a rebound in 2025 to the best level in recent years at 3614. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hunan Province was 9 in 2021, 9 in 2022, 7 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 6 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 6, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it ranks 80th, placing it among the upper-middle tier of science and engineering universities nationwide, with few History Category majors. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 77th, with a rating of 'average'. In 2025, there were signs of a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors, which somewhat suppressed application psychology. Management Science and Engineering is rated A, but it has no direct disciplinary mapping to History Category majors (Law and Ideological and Political Education). Law belongs to the first-level discipline of Law, and Ideological and Political Education belongs to the first-level discipline of Marxist Theory, neither of which has been independently rated at this university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, there are approximately 187,000 History Category examinees in Hunan Province, a significant increase of about 31.2% from 142,500 in 2025, leading to markedly intensified competition. Hefei University of Technology is located in Anhui Province, and its enrollment in History Category in Hunan Province is extremely small (only 6 in 2025), so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the rebound of rankings in 2025 to the best level in recent years, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and the significant increase of about 31.2% in History Category examinees in Hunan Province, competition is expected to intensify markedly in 2026, with rankings moving significantly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3434, with a range of 2934–3934.
